description_long: This is a simple, sturdy fence composed of two thick vertical posts and two horizontal rails. The rails are slightly uneven, giving the fence a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The posts are rectangular in cross-section and extend slightly above the top rail, with flat tops and no decorative caps. The entire structure appears to be made from a solid, uniform material, likely painted or coated in a matte white finish. There are no visible fasteners, joints, or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This type of fence is commonly used in parks, gardens, or as a boundary marker in urban and suburban environments.
description: A minimalist white fence with two thick posts and two uneven horizontal rails, featuring a rustic and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both vertical posts and the two horizontal rails, with the unevenness of the rails clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the depth of the posts and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the posts and rails from the opposite side, with the same rustic rail alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the relative positions of the rails and posts.
